arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho fires back at Pep Guardiola Premier League titles comment with '150 lawsuits' jibe
arts.sum: Former Manchester United manager Jose Mourinho has gone in hard on Manchester City and Pep Guardiola after the Spaniard made a mockery of his Premier League title-winning record

arts.ttl: Club World Cup draw: Holders Man City take on Juventus
arts.sum: Manchester City will face Juventus in he group stage of the FIFA Club World Cup next summer, following the draw for the first round. FIFA’s new-look tournament will take place in the United States between 15 June and 13 July next year. arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho responds to Pep Guardiola with savage 115 charges dig after Liverpool salute
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola took an unprovoked swipe at rival Jose Mourinho this week and now the ex-Chelsea, Manchester United and Tottenham manager has responded in brutal fashion

arts.ttl: Club considering whether to sign Crystal Palace or Norwich City player
arts.sum: Tyrick Mitchell has been a regular for Crystal Palace this season and Jose Cordoba has been an important part of Norwich City’s backline in the Championship in the current campaign. The Englishman has played 17 times in all competitions for the Eagles, operating at left wing-back under Oliver Glasner. arts.ttl: I expected the best when I joined Man City - what I found was even better
arts.sum: Manchester City begin their FA Youth Cup defence on Friday - but there will be a different coach in the technical area trying to build on last year's success.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho hits back at Pep Guardiola after Man City boss said he'd won twice as many Premier League titles as he says he 'won fairly' and without having to deal with '150 lawsuits'
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has issued a scathing response to Pep Guardiola after the Man City boss reminded fans that he had won twice as many Premier League titles as the Portuguese.

arts.ttl: Manchester City star likely to depart as part of ‘technical revolution’ – Club readying summer move
arts.sum: Manchester City brought Ilkay Gundogan back to the club last summer and since then the midfielder has again been a reliable squad player for the Citizens. The German has played 19 times in all competitions this season, scoring two goals. arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has urged Man City to sign Premier League midfielder to replace Rodri
arts.sum: The injury of Manchester City midfielder Rodri has affected the Premier League champions in ways nobody could have imagined. They went on a seven match winless run that ended finally with a win against Nottingham Forest at the Etihad Stadium. arts.ttl: Premier League Team of the Week: Mohamed Salah, Kevin De Bruyne, Declan Rice
arts.sum: Sports Mole selects its Premier League Team of the Week, including Mohamed Salah, Kevin De Bruyne and Declan Rice.

arts.ttl: A year without a goal! What happened to Jack Grealish?
arts.sum: Jack Grealish's last goal for Manchester City was in December 2023. Since then the former £100m man has played over 1,547 minutes of football without finding the net.
